title: Cooked Carrot│烤胡蘿蔔
description: Carrots and Golden Carrots need to be cooked, eating them raw provides lower nutritional value.│胡蘿蔔和金胡蘿蔔需要烤過，生吃會提供較低的營養價值。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Introduce│介紹
**Carrots can be cooked in a Furnace, Smoker or Campfire.│使用熔爐、煙燻爐或營火即可烹飪胡蘿蔔。**
## Changes in nutritional value│營養價值變動
- Carrot: 2 Hunger Value, 1.2 Saturation│胡蘿蔔：2飢餓值，1.2飽食度
- Golden Carrot: 6 Hunger Value, 2.6 Saturation│金胡蘿蔔：6飢餓值，2.6飽食度
## Nutritional value of cooked carrots│烤過的胡蘿蔔的營養價值
- Cooked Carrot: 3 Hunger Value, 3.6 Saturation│烤胡蘿蔔：3飢餓值，3.6飽食度
  - Get command: ```/loot give @s loot cooked_carrot:cooked_carrot```│獲取指令：```/loot give @s loot cooked_carrot:cooked_carrot```
- ooked Golden Carrot: 6 Hunger Value, 14.4 Saturation│C烤金胡蘿蔔：6飢餓值，14.4飽食度
  - Get command: ```/loot give @s loot cooked_carrot:cooked_golden_carrot```│獲取指令：```/loot give @s loot cooked_carrot:cooked_golden_carrot```
# Precautions│注意事項
1. The item name and item description of "Cooked Carrot" and "Cooked Golden Carrot" only support three languages: ```zh_cn```,```zh_tw```,```en_us```. If you need it to support more languages, please let me know by reporting the issue.│"烤胡蘿蔔"和"烤金胡蘿蔔"的物品名稱和物品描述只支援```zh_cn```,```zh_tw```,```en_us```三種語言，如果你需要其支援更多語言，請透過匯報問題讓我知道。
2. If you install the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack), then regardless of whether you install the mod version or the data pack version, you will also need to install an additional resource pack file called "CC_is_compatible_with_EA", and move it to the top of all resource packs.│如果你安裝了[食用動畫](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack)，那麼不論你安裝的是模組版本還是資料包版本，你都需要安裝名為"CC_is_compatible_with_EA"的附加資源包檔案，並將其的排序移動到所有資源包的最上方。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
